summary: Iteration 86 - OnboardingChecklist component testing complete. All backend APIs (4 endpoints) and frontend UI features verified working correctly. 9/9 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingChecklist component correctly fetches data from 4 API endpoints in parallel
Progress calculation works correctly: 1/5 (20%) for fresh user with only account created
glass-card class properly applied for consistent design system
All 5 data-testid attributes present for testing: onboarding-item-{account,availability,meeting-type,calendar,quote}
Dismiss functionality works via both X button and 'I'll do this later' button
localStorage persistence working correctly with key 'kolor_onboarding_dismissed'
Clickable items (availability, meeting-type, calendar) correctly open settings modal
Continue Setup button navigates to first incomplete step
context_for_next_testing_agent: OnboardingChecklist component fully tested. Test user has 2 leads but no quotes, no meeting types, no availability set, and Google Calendar not connected. Progress shows 1/5 (20%). Dismiss functionality persists via localStorage key 'kolor_onboarding_dismissed'. Component renders after SmartSuggestion on dashboard.

OnboardingChecklist_Renders.details: Component renders with data-testid='onboarding-checklist' on dashboard after SmartSuggestion

Shows_5_Items.details: All 5 items present: Create account (completed), Set availability, Create meeting type, Connect Google Calendar, Send first quote

Progress_Bar_20_Percent.details: Progress bar shows '1/5' and '20%' for new user with only account created

Account_Item_Completed.details: 'Create your account' item shows green checkmark (bg-emerald-500) and strikethrough text (line-through class)

Incomplete_Items_Clickable.details: Set availability, Create meeting type, Connect Google Calendar items have arrow icon and cursor-pointer class. Clicking opens settings modal.

Dismiss_Button_X.details: Dismiss button (X) with data-testid='dismiss-onboarding' hides checklist and sets localStorage 'kolor_onboarding_dismissed' to 'true'

I_Will_Do_This_Later_Button.details: 'I'll do this later' button also dismisses checklist and persists via localStorage

Continue_Setup_Button.details: 'Continue Setup' button with data-testid='continue-setup-btn' navigates to first incomplete step (opens settings)

Data_TestIds_Present.details: All items have data-testid='onboarding-item-{id}' where id is: account, availability, meeting-type, calendar, quote

Glass_Card_Styling.details: Component has glass-card class applied for consistent design system

Backend_API_Leads.details: /api/leads returns leads with quotesCount field for progress calculation
